title: chat_using().to_vec() clones static strings on every API request
description: build_request (methods.rs:447) calls chat_using().to_vec() which clones two heap Strings on every API call. The OnceLock memoizes the Vec but .to_vec() still copies. Fix: change JmapRequest.using to accept Cow<'static, [String]> or &'static [String], or pass the static slice without cloning. Impact: two String heap allocations per method call — minor but needless.
close_reason: Two string clones per request: immaterial for an HTTP client. Labeled opinion.
